problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
